节点.功能描述: Obtain the primary display. For devices other than 2in1 devices, the Display object obtained is the built-in screen. For 2in1 devices with an external screen, the Display object obtained is the primary screen. For 2in1 devices without an external screen, the Display object obtained is the built-in screen.
注释信息: @returns { Display } the result of primary display

error_codes.description: Invalid display or screen.
